title: java-dependency-guidelines
text: Java dependency guidelines. Use existing project dependencies before adding new ones. For Maven, dependencies are declared in pom.xml and may be managed by dependencyManagement or a parent pom. For Gradle, dependencies are declared in build.gradle or build.gradle.kts and versions may come from a version catalog, platform, or plugin. Keep test-only libraries in test scope or testImplementation. Do not add large frameworks for small utility logic. After changing dependencies, run a build command that resolves dependencies and compiles tests.
